function StudentStats({ students, summary }) { const sortedStudents = [...students].sort((a, b) => Number(b.marks) - Number(a.marks)); const maxMark = summary.max || 1; return (

Performance Overview

Compare overall student scores

Total Records {summary.totalRecords}
Average Marks {summary.average}
Highest Marks {summary.max}
{sortedStudents.length > 0 ? ( sortedStudents.slice(0, 4).map((student) => { const width = (Number(student.marks) / maxMark) * 100; return (
{student.name} {student.marks}
); }) ) : (

Add a student to see performance bars.

)}
Average Score

{summary.average}

Max Score

{summary.max}

Min Score

{summary.min}

); } export default StudentStats;
